summary: [ART-CHARTER] Governing signed charter: approved formal goal is enzyme activity prediction; protein structure generation is an explicit non-goal. Molecule generation, docking, and structure prediction were brainstorming only, not approved. [ART-DATA] Approved data: EnzymeBench v3 snapshot EBV3-7A91 with family-disjoint train/validation split. EnzymeBench v2 and temporary CSV export are deprecated, retained only for reproducibility, and prohibited for formal runs. [ART-METRIC] Primary metric: macro AUROC; protein family is the statistical unit, with family-level formal evaluation. Micro F1, accuracy, per-protein averaging, and 0.75 threshold are exploratory only. [ART-SEEDS] Formal seeds: 7, 21, 42. Seed 13 is an abandoned pilot. Report failed formal seeds; do not silently drop them. This supersedes seed-42-only script defaults.
